title: Join Hands with the Global South! Live Dialogue with Helga Zepp-LaRouche
description:
Join Helga Zepp-LaRouche in a live dialogue on September 6 to discuss how to brings the Global North into a New Paradigm. Make sure to  RSVP to the upcoming conference September 9: https://schillerinstitute.nationbuilder.com/conference_20230909?recruiter_id=1128

Send in your questions early to questions@schillerinstitute.org

chapters.title: The momentum of building a new economic system
Xi Jinping not going to the G20
